auditor.summary: Build is critically incomplete. Only 3 of 5 required page files were generated (contract-management, inventory, purchase-orders). The vendor-management and forecasting pages are missing entirely. The Playwright test file was not created. Additionally, all 3 generated files have TypeScript strict-mode violations: KPI component receives non-existent 'trend' prop, Badge component uses invalid variants ('secondary', 'destructive'), and StatusPill receives incompatible status values. These issues will cause compilation failures. The build fails AC6, AC7, and AC8 completely, and only partially satisfies AC1. Score is 40/100 - below the 65 threshold for conditional pass. Build must be regenerated with all 5 page files, correct component prop interfaces, and the complete Playwright test suite.

top_issues.description: KPI component is passed a 'trend' prop that does not exist in the actual KPIProps interface. The KPI component only accepts: label, value, sub, badge, accent, className. This will cause TypeScript compilation error under strict mode.
Same issue - KPI component receives non-existent 'trend' prop. TypeScript strict mode will fail.
